zh.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh.Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾查阿培爾 哈德萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Vavasour於1322年出生在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特時，她的父親Sir Henry Vavasour II30歲，母親Anabella FitzHugh14歲。她於大約1338年與Sir Miles Stapelton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國越可爾享年28歲。

zh-hans.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh-hans.Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾查阿培爾 哈德萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Vavasour于1322年出生在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特时，她的父亲Sir Henry Vavasour II30岁，母亲Anabella FitzHugh14岁。她于大约1338年与Sir Miles Stapelton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国越可爾享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Vavasour was born in 1322, in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Henry Vavasour II, was 30 and her mother, Anabella FitzHugh, was 14. She married Sir Miles Stapelton about 1338. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1350, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Vavasour est née en 1322, à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Vavasour II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anabella FitzHugh, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Miles Stapelton environ 1338. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Vavasour 1322 in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Vavasour II 30 und ihre Mutter Anabella FitzHugh 14. Sie hat um 1338 Sir Miles Stapelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Vavasour è nata il nel 1322 nel Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Vavasour II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anabella FitzHugh, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir Miles Stapelton circa 1338. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Vavasourが1322年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Vavasour IIは30歳，母Anabella FitzHughは14歳であった。約1338年にSir Miles Stapeltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Vavasour(이)가 1322년 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Vavasour II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anabella FitzHugh(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1338년 Sir Miles Stapelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 요르크실르에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Vavasour nasceu em 1322, em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Vavasour II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anabella FitzHugh, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Miles Stapelton aproximadamente 1338. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Vavasour родилась в 1322 г. в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Vavasour II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anabella FitzHugh, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Miles Stapelton около 1338 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Vavasour nació en 1322, en Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Vavasour II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anabella FitzHugh, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Sir Miles Stapelton aproximadamente 1338. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años.
